items.title: Watch SpaceX launch 3 huge BlueBird direct-to-cell satellites from Florida early on June 17
items.excerpt: A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch three of AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird direct-to-cell satellites early Wednesday morning (June 17), and you can watch the action live.

items.title: SpaceX prepares to launch AST SpaceMobile BlueBird satellites from Florida
items.excerpt: SpaceX is preparing to launch three AST SpaceMobile BlueBirds during early morning hours Wednesday, June 17, from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.

items.title: SpaceX rocket to launch 3 AST SpaceMobile satellites
items.excerpt: Follow FLORIDA TODAY Space Team live updates from SpaceX’s upcoming rocket launch on an AST SpaceMobile mission from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Beyond Space-Based Connectivity, A Defense Powerhouse In The Making
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile aims to deploy a global space-based 4G/5G network, targeting both commercial and defense markets. Read why ASTS stock is a Buy.

items.title: Dear AST SpaceMobile Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for June 17
items.excerpt: After a volatile week for ASTS stock, investors may want to circle June 17 on their calendars as AST SpaceMobile gears up for a closely watched satellite launch.

items.title: Why AST SpaceMobile May Be One Of The Market's Biggest Asymmetric Bets

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Stock: The Next Phase Could Be Massive (NASDAQ:ASTS)
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile has scaled manufacturing to over 500,000 square feet and targets production of six fully assembled satellites monthly. Read why ASTS stock is a buy.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Makes History in 5G Broadband Cellular Connectivity from Space
items.excerpt: First-ever 5G connection for voice and data between an everyday, unmodified smartphone and a satellite in space.

items.title: T-Mobile Takes Coverage Above and Beyond With SpaceX
items.excerpt: T-Mobile and SpaceX announce Coverage Above and Beyond using Starlink direct-to-cell connectivity.
